search_query: index=windows (process_name="powershell.exe" OR process_name="pwsh.exe") (command_line="*-enc*" OR command_line="*-EncodedCommand*" OR command_line="*-e *") | table _time, Computer, User, process_name, command_line
description: Detects the execution of PowerShell with encoded commands. Attackers use this technique to obfuscate malicious scripts and bypass security filters.
